# Capital Glass Door — Extended LLM Context

Business: Capital Glass Door
Domain: https://www.dmv247glassrepair.com/
Phones: +1-703-244-0559, +1-202-643-4062
Hours: 24/7 emergency response
Primary location reference: Washington, DC
Service region: Washington DC, Arlington VA, Alexandria VA, Fairfax VA, Bethesda MD, Silver Spring MD, Rockville MD, Baltimore MD, Northern Virginia, Maryland, DMV area

Core services:
- Emergency glass repair
- Emergency board-up service
- Storefront glass repair and replacement
- Commercial glass repair
- Commercial door repair
- Glass door repair
- Door closer repair
- Tempered glass replacement
- Residential glass repair
- Shower door repair
- Foggy double-pane / IGU replacement
- Locksmith service

Client FAQ context:
- For emergency situations, calling is preferred for fastest dispatch.
- Board-up is typically performed first when the opening is unsafe or unsecured.
- Replacement timing depends on glass type, dimensions, and site access.
- Property managers can accelerate service by sharing photos, location, and access details.
- Door closer and panic hardware issues can be serviced alongside glass repair.
